steps.action: Create a new registered user via /register with g2rbac_ prefix
steps.observed: Account g2rbac_1773899162 created and logged in

steps.action: Navigate to /admin as the registered user
steps.observed: Browser was redirected to / (public home), no admin layout rendered

steps.action: Call admin API endpoint with same session
steps.observed: GET /api/admin/users?page=1&pageSize=5 returned 403 with "Forbidden: admin access required"

assertions.title: Unknown routes show 404

steps.observed: Friendly '404 Page not found' UI rendered
HTTP 200 OK with Vite index.html response

evidence.network: curl GET /this-route-should-not-exist-g2 -> HTTP/1.1 200 OK with SPA HTML shell (foundation-auth/rbac-api-404/VAL-PUBLIC-002-curl.txt)

assertions.issues: Contract requires HTTP 404 for unknown routes, but the route returns 200 while rendering a client-side 404 view.

assertions.title: Flash messages display correctly

steps.expected: Success flash appears with success styling
steps.observed: Toast "Signed in successfully" appeared after login
Toast reported data-type=success but computed colors were neutral (background oklch(1 0 0), border oklch(0.922 0 0), text oklch(0.145 0 0))

steps.action: Navigate away after flash is shown
steps.observed: After navigating to /admin/users, toast no longer visible

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/login observed in browser request log during login flow (foundation-auth/rbac-api-404/VAL-ADMIN-004-network.txt); toast style snapshot in foundation-auth/rbac-api-404/VAL-ADMIN-004-flash-style.json

assertions.issues: Flash lifecycle works (appears then clears on navigation), but success flash does not meet contract color expectation (green).

frictions.description: agent-browser request logs did not include response status codes needed for strict status assertions.
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental curl/eval artifacts for explicit HTTP status/body evidence.

frictions.description: Toast visibility is brief, making style capture timing-sensitive.
frictions.resolution: Captured screenshot immediately after login and extracted toast computed styles via in-page eval.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-GUARD-006) and 2 failed (VAL-PUBLIC-002, VAL-ADMIN-004).
